tasks.title: DirectorySyncService + ContactCardImporter
tasks.prompt: FIRST: read spec/002-directory-sync/{requirements.md, design.md, acceptance/directory-sync.feature}. SECOND: add service/DirectorySyncService.kt (alongside existing GatewayService.kt + TransportRegistry.kt) and crypto/ContactCardImporter.kt (alongside KeyBundleImporter.kt — same shape: sealed class inline, explicit "BC" provider per Article C-II). Per-bridge poll + Ed25519 verify against bridge_trust.pubkey + Room transaction apply + MQTT-trigger subscriber. Tests at FLAT layout per Article C-VIII.
